reason: All 4 acceptance criteria PASS: LUNCH no longer contains any CONDIMENT (טחינה and רוטב עגבניות removed), replacement טונה has category=protein (approved category), LUNCH kcal=617.5 is within ±5% of 635.0 (range 603.2–666.8), and plan total 1763.0 is within ±5% of 1780.5 (range 1691.5–1869.5).

criterion_results.criterion: LUNCH slot no longer contains any item with category=CONDIMENT; specifically טחינה (tahini) is absent from LUNCH items.
criterion_results.evidence: Backup confirms before-state had food_058 (טחינה, condiment, 119 kcal) and food_059 (רוטב עגבניות, 14.5 kcal) in LUNCH. Current plan LUNCH contains only: food_016 (בטטה), food_050 (שעועית לבנה), food_051 (אדממה), food_012 (טונה) — food_db.py confirms all as non-CONDIMENT categories.

criterion_results.criterion: Replacement item added to LUNCH has a category appropriate for a main meal slot (PROTEIN, VEGETABLE, LEGUME, or GRAIN) — not CONDIMENT, SPICE, or SAUCE.
criterion_results.evidence: food_db.py FoodDatabase.search('tuna') returns category=protein for food UUID matching טונה. Protein is explicitly in the approved set. Verified via live DB query.

criterion_results.criterion: Total kcal of all LUNCH items stays within ±5% of original (635.0 kcal), i.e. between 603.2 and 666.8 kcal.
criterion_results.evidence: Before: 635.0 kcal (backup confirms). After: 172.0+208.5+121.0+116.0=617.5 kcal. 617.5 is within [603.2, 666.8]. Math verified: removed 119.0+14.5=133.5 kcal, added 116.0 kcal → net -17.5 kcal.

criterion_results.criterion: Plan-level total kcal stays within ±5% of pre-fix total (1780.5 kcal), i.e. between 1691.5 and 1869.5 kcal.
criterion_results.evidence: Before: 1780.5 kcal (confirmed in backup + plan file). After: 1763.0 kcal (read from plan totals). 1763.0 is within [1691.5, 1869.5]. Math: 1780.5-133.5+116.0=1763.0 ✓
